chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-628 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.7606/2025 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 11 and reply as at A 3. For hearing of CMA No.5019/2025 4. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mr. Ahmed Masood, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG PI Nazim PS PIB Colony Karachi --------- Counsel for the petitioner submits that the issue under adjudication in the instant lis has been decided by the Court of Senior Civil Judge-V, Karachi in Civil Suit No.5119 of 2025 vide order dated 02.12.2025, therefore, he seeks dismissal of this petition as having become infructuous. Order accordingly. JUDGE Nadir*
